instructions.purpose: Map business questions to curated semantic queries for /api/ask
how_to_use: Replace placeholder table/column names with your real model names.
Keep queryKey values stable; route questions to these keys.
Move finalized DAX into SEMANTIC_QUERY_PACK_JSON and keys into SEMANTIC_DEFAULT_QUERY_KEYS or intent routing.

library.question: What are the top 5 revenue drivers right now?
Summarize KPI health in 3 lines.
Which regions are underperforming vs average?
What changed most in the last 30 days?
library.daxTemplate: EVALUATE TOPN(10, ADDCOLUMNS(SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(<PRODUCT_TABLE>[Product]), "Sales_30d", CALCULATE(<MEASURE_NET_SALES>, DATESINPERIOD(<DATE_TABLE>[Date], MAX(<DATE_TABLE>[Date]), -30, DAY)), "Sales_prev30d", CALCULATE(<MEASURE_NET_SALES>, DATESINPERIOD(<DATE_TABLE>[Date], MAX(<DATE_TABLE>[Date]) - 30, -30, DAY)), "Delta", [Sales_30d] - [Sales_prev30d]), ABS([Delta]), DESC)

library.question: What are the biggest anomalies/outliers?
library.daxTemplate: EVALUATE TOPN(10, ADDCOLUMNS(SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(<PRODUCT_TABLE>[Product], "NetSales", <MEASURE_NET_SALES>), "ZScoreApprox", DIVIDE([NetSales] - AVERAGEX(ALL(<PRODUCT_TABLE>[Product]), CALCULATE(<MEASURE_NET_SALES>)), STDEVX.P(ALL(<PRODUCT_TABLE>[Product]), CALCULATE(<MEASURE_NET_SALES>)))), ABS([ZScoreApprox]), DESC)

library.question: What are top products by net sales this month?
Which products are declining month over month?
library.daxTemplate: EVALUATE TOPN(15, ADDCOLUMNS(SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(<PRODUCT_TABLE>[Product]), "Sales_CM", CALCULATE(<MEASURE_NET_SALES>, DATESMTD(<DATE_TABLE>[Date])), "Sales_PM", CALCULATE(<MEASURE_NET_SALES>, DATEADD(DATESMTD(<DATE_TABLE>[Date]), -1, MONTH)), "MoM", [Sales_CM] - [Sales_PM]), [MoM], ASC)

library.question: Which channels/customers contribute most revenue?
What is contribution by product family?
What is YTD vs last year YTD?
library.daxTemplate: EVALUATE ROW("YTD", CALCULATE(<MEASURE_NET_SALES>, DATESYTD(<DATE_TABLE>[Date])), "LYTD", CALCULATE(<MEASURE_NET_SALES>, SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR(DATESYTD(<DATE_TABLE>[Date]))), "Delta", CALCULATE(<MEASURE_NET_SALES>, DATESYTD(<DATE_TABLE>[Date])) - CALCULATE(<MEASURE_NET_SALES>, SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR(DATESYTD(<DATE_TABLE>[Date]))))

library.question: Which region has best margin?
Which region has worst margin?
What are low-volume high-revenue SKUs?
Which products have high units but low revenue?
Which customer is growing fastest quarter over quarter?
library.daxTemplate: EVALUATE TOPN(10, ADDCOLUMNS(SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(<CUSTOMER_TABLE>[Customer]), "Sales_CQ", CALCULATE(<MEASURE_NET_SALES>, DATESQTD(<DATE_TABLE>[Date])), "Sales_PQ", CALCULATE(<MEASURE_NET_SALES>, DATEADD(DATESQTD(<DATE_TABLE>[Date]), -1, QUARTER)), "QoQ", [Sales_CQ] - [Sales_PQ]), [QoQ], DESC)

library.question: Where is revenue concentration risk highest?
library.daxTemplate: EVALUATE TOPN(10, ADDCOLUMNS(SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(<CUSTOMER_TABLE>[Customer], "NetSales", <MEASURE_NET_SALES>), "Share", DIVIDE([NetSales], CALCULATE(<MEASURE_NET_SALES>, ALL(<CUSTOMER_TABLE>[Customer])))), [Share], DESC)

library.question: What is net sales trend by month for last 12 months?
Which SKUs are newly emerging this period?
library.daxTemplate: EVALUATE TOPN(20, ADDCOLUMNS(SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(<PRODUCT_TABLE>[Product]), "Sales_CM", CALCULATE(<MEASURE_NET_SALES>, DATESMTD(<DATE_TABLE>[Date])), "Sales_PM", CALCULATE(<MEASURE_NET_SALES>, DATEADD(DATESMTD(<DATE_TABLE>[Date]), -1, MONTH)), "Emergence", [Sales_CM] - [Sales_PM]), [Emergence], DESC)

library.question: Which products are margin dilutive?
What are the top opportunities if revenue drops 10%?
